title: Admin reviews assistant rollout readiness
given: The tenant has assistant audit events, release gates, action queue work, prompt library items, playbooks, and governed automation policies.
when: An operator with org.settings view opens /assistant/admin.
then: The console shows readiness score and blocking checks derived from evidence coverage, release gate state, automation control, open high-priority work, approved prompts, and active playbooks.
The permission matrix shows each global permission with the number of roles that grant it.
Users without org.settings edit can inspect the console but cannot save rollout controls or export packets.

title: Admin saves a controlled pilot rollout
when: They choose PILOT or CONTROLLED rollout mode, select pilot roles/sites, adjust thresholds, and save.
then: An AssistantAdminControl row is upserted for the tenant.
Pilot roles, pilot sites, thresholds, and flags are stored durably.
An AssistantAuditEvent records the admin control change for traceability.

title: Admin exports an assistant compliance packet
given: The admin console has live readiness, permissions, rollout, and threshold signals.
when: The admin exports the compliance packet.
then: The packet includes tenant, rollout mode, pilot scope, thresholds, readiness checks, signals, permissions coverage, and explicit control notes.
The packet is stored on AssistantAdminControl as packetJson with READY or BLOCKED status.
Exporting the packet does not mutate operational order, shipment, supplier, inventory, finance, or automation rows.
